title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Wonderly Ltd
body: "Application number 5055  Applicant Haymarket Media Group Ltd objected to the name used by Wonderly Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 7 March 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Wonderly Ltd is changed to 14689978, LTD. "
